title: Final Oscar Predictions: Best Picture — It's a Two-Film Showdown Between 'Sinners' vs. 'One Battle After Another,' And History on the Line
text: The piece outlines a competitive Oscar race between two frontrunners. Ryan Coogler's vampire drama Sinners is predicted to win, with Paul Thomas Anderson's political action film One Battle After Another as the alternative. One Battle After Another has secured major awards including Critics Choice, Golden Globes, BAFTA, and DGA honors—accolades typically preceding Best Picture victory. Sinners holds significant guild recognition including ACE, SAG ensemble, and WGA awards, a combination never previously lost with at a Best Picture ceremony. A Sinners victory would represent historic firsts: the inaugural Best Picture win for a Black female producer and potentially director. Clayton Davis notes: One way or another, records will fall on Oscar night. The 98th Academy Awards ceremony is scheduled for March 15, 2026, hosted by Conan O'Brien.
